---
title: "Lucy and Christian Wainwright and Other Tales"
---

## Lucy and Christian Wainwright and Other Tales

**Author:** Ann Maria Carter Smith
**Date:** 1863
**Imprint:** London: Masters

### Notes

The title story originally appeared as \'Lucy and Christian Wainwright, or, The One Eternal Meeting, 1781\' in <i>MP</i> (February 1856) 111-38.  The volume also includes ‘Some Thorns and Roses from a Homely Life’, ‘Bygone Days’, ‘A Household Record’, ‘The Two Beauties’, ‘Will No One do Likewise?’ and ‘The Lost are Found’.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
